'''Paradise''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located on a small [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route branching off of the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]]. It was known for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] more than it was for shipping or commercial goods. It was also well known for its [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]], pleasure slaves, and sales of various illegal narcotics. [[Lucia (soldier)|Lucia]] met with the [[Iktotchi/Legends|Iktotchi]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Darth Cognus|Huntress]] at Paradise in [[980 BBY]] to hire her to [[Massacre on Doan|assassinate]] the rebel leader [[Gelba]] and later to hire her again for a [[Skirmish in Darth Bane's mansion|mission]] to capture [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]].<ref name="DOE" />

{{Station-stub}}
